title: Whole Cake Island Comes Into View
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: My, oh my!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Sha Sha sha sha shad

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shouldn't you boys be a bit more worried about lil' ole' me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Woah!! Miss!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 29th Daughter of the Charlotte Family Charlotte PRALINE (Hammerhead Shark Half Mermaid)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Were you Eaves- dropping this entire time...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What?! Are you lot trying to hide some- thing from me?! I thought our relationship was better than that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Eek!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aladine!! Don't tell me that you're planning on deserting me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If all this doesn't sit well with Mama?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, of course not! I'm sure I'll be able to negotiate with her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Negotiate?! There's absolutely no need!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You know that I'd choose you over Mama any day of the week, darling()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take me with you in the event that anything happens :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: KyaAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH,O such passionate loveee!!^)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forgive me Wadatsumi, I dragged you all the way out here and now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Naw its okay, I'm having a Lotta fun wid evrywn around!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: In any case, Prairie...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you truly believe that we'd incur Mama's wrath if I left...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well now, let's see...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You wouldn't be the first person who'd tried to leave...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Having said that, not a single soul who was brave enough to utter such words...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Has lived to see another day, Shashasha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Whole cake Island, present time

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: capital, "sweet City"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Sir Moscato !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Sir Moscato has died!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Please don't leave us, Sir Moscato!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: move aside.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: hurry up and remove the body.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Waahhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yes ma'am.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not leave for even a single second, do you hear me??

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, sir Mont D'Or!! Will boss jinbe also be killed?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hell if I know!! The only thing I can say for certain is that when Mama flies into a rage, no one is safe... not even her own son!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Whole cake chateau

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So... you want to cut ties with me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Jinbe...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why boss ?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please don't leave, boss!! Why must you go?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Squee!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: silence !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't ask idiots who wish to leave why they want to leave!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't give a damn about his reasons .....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, we're both pirates... We should try to live freely, just as all pirates strive to do.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 45 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
